reason: Verified that the agent "QA-20260703-010731-a7ts" can be accessed, its status is acceptable, and it responds correctly to a math question with the correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut application homepage with sidebar containing agents.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260703-010731-a7ts" in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent's page. Agent status displayed as "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Confirmed agent status is "idle", which is one of the acceptable statuses.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully entered in the textarea with placeholder "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send".
Clicked the send button — Message sent successfully. Page navigated to session "Basic Math Question Discussion". Agent status changed to "working" then back to "idle" after response.
Waited for response — Received agent response within 2 seconds (well within the 3-minute timeout).

Verified response mentions "4" — Agent response displays "4" as the answer to 2+2. Response appears in the message list below the user's question. Screenshot taken showing the complete conversation with the correct answer displayed.
